# terrible_community_general_consul_auth_method (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Specifies a name for the ACL auth method. The name can contain alphanumeric characters, dashes `-`, and underscores `_`.

### Optional

- `config` (String) The raw configuration to use for the chosen auth method. Contents vary depending upon the `type` chosen. Required when the auth method is created.
- `description` (String) Free form human readable description of the auth method.
- `display_name` (String) An optional name to use instead of `name` when displaying information about this auth method.
- `max_token_ttl` (String) This specifies the maximum life of any token created by this auth method. Can be specified in the form of `60s` or `5m` (that is, 60 seconds or 5 minutes, respectively).
- `state` (String) Whether the token should be present or absent.
- `token_locality` (String) Defines the kind of token that this auth method should produce.
- `type` (String) The type of auth method being configured. This field is immutable. Required when the auth method is created.

### Read-Only

- `auth_method` (String) The auth method as returned by the Consul HTTP API.
- `operation` (String) The operation performed.
